name: Public Joint Stock Company Research and Production Corporation United Wagon Company
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Research and Production Corporation United Wagon Company engages in the freight car building business in Russia and internationally. The company offers gondolas, hoppers, tank cars, platforms, box and dump cars, bogies, car castings, bogie suspension springs, wheelsets, and flat cars. It also sells and leases railcars; generates power; and issues debt securities. In addition, the company provides goods transportation; utilities; and engineering and construction services. The company operates 72 service centers. Public Joint Stock Company Research and Production Corporation United Wagon Company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Moscow, Russia.
